title: Maintenance of information in applications for licensure
doc_html:
§12.1. Maintenance of information in applications for licensure

            All persons applying for any form of license or certificate of authority pursuant to this Title shall notify the commissioner of changes to the content of the application.

            Acts 2019, No. 66, §1, eff. July 1, 2019.
doc_text:
§12.1.  Maintenance of information in applications for licensure
All persons applying for any form of license or certificate of authority pursuant to this
Title shall notify the commissioner of changes to the content of the application.
Acts 2019, No. 66, §1, eff. July 1, 2019.
